of the Moody Foundation. The image features a stylized teal "M" on the left, followed by the word "MOODY" in bold navy blue uppercase letters, with "FOUNDATION" in smaller, evenly spaced navy blue uppercase letters beneath it. PNC Bank logo featuring an orange circle with a white geometric design on the left, followed by the words "PNC BANK" in blue, bold, uppercase letters—often seen among sponsors on a crisp, white background. Austin Marathon Half Marathon & 5K
